name: MYOB Sync
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000NejDqMAJ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000NejDqMAJ.jpg", "name": "myobsync.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 200, "width": 400}}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by mysync", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://mysync.io/myobandneto.html", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on, contact "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.mysync.io/hc/en-us/requests/new", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "mysync"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "MYOB AccountRight is powerful accounting with business management capabilities so your client\u2019s business can stay competitive and get ahead. Within the dashboard, you get a powerful single view to interact with your clients online."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Gain timely, actionable insights into your clients\u2019 businesses with Power BI, a powerful analytics tool that allows you to give even better advice to your AccountRight Live clients."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Richer data allows you to have better conversations with your clients, helping them identify opportunities and threats in advance to maximise their business performance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This app is powered by mysync and includes a 14-day free trial for new installations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up MYOB"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the MYOB add-on in your Neto webstore:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find the MYOB Sync add-on and click the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The MYOB Sync add-on will be installed in your control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the pop-up window, click the "}, {"text": "Configure MYOB by Sync", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps on the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.mysync.io/hc/en-us/articles/900006148026-MYOB-Sync-Neto-Guide", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "mysync help site"}]}, {"text": " to set up your MYOB Sync connection."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
